bugs.description: batch_tasks uses range(0, len(tasks) - 1, batch_size) which skips the last task
bugs.current_code: for i in range(0, len(tasks) - 1, batch_size):
bugs.correct_code: for i in range(0, len(tasks), batch_size):

bugs.description: validate_task checks wrong fields ['id', 'name', 'data'] instead of ['id', 'type', 'payload']
calculate_priority calls .lower() on task.get('type') which could be None
File descriptor opened in __init__ but never closed in stop() method
bugs.correct_code: Remove this line or use context manager; add self.log_file.close() in stop()

bugs.description: Exception caught but silently ignored with 'pass', preventing error propagation
bugs.correct_code:
except Exception as e:
                return format_error(500, f"Server error: {str(e)}")

bugs.description: Mutable default argument {} shared across all function calls
bugs.current_code: def process_task(self, task_id: str, data: Dict[str, Any] = {}) -> Dict[str, Any]:
bugs.correct_code: def process_task(self, task_id: str, data: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
